text.title: Decomposition: Django Monolith to Bounded Apps Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the spec artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-decomposition-django.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: missing dependency_edges/forbidden_edges/owner_map/migration_plan; cycle present in dependency_edges.
